name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83480 Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes bags, featuring a drawstring from the former and a molded bottom from the latter, blending trendy style with practicality. The woven chain and leather shoulder straps are detachable for multiple carrying styles. 14×20.5×14cm
